tasks.description: Create src/Types.swift with SessionState enum (Int8, cases: idle=0, clamshellActive=1, thermalEmergency=2, cleanupPending=3), ThermalLevel enum (Int8, cases: nominal=0, fair=1, serious=2, critical=3), PowerSource enum (Int8, cases: battery=0, acPowered=1, unknown=2). Define IOPMAssertionID as UInt32 alias.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: All three enums compile with Int8 raw values. SessionState, ThermalLevel, PowerSource are accessible in tests via @testable import.

tasks.description: Add to src/Types.swift: define Constants struct with static let for pmsetPath ("/usr/bin/pmset"), assertionName ("com.closed-display.no-idle-sleep"), xpcServiceName ("com.closed-display.helper"), debounceInterval (0.5 seconds), queue labels ("com.closed-display.session", "com.closed-display.thermal").
tasks.acceptance_criteria: All constants are accessible as static let on Constants struct. No magic strings in implementation.

tasks.description: Create src/XPC.swift with HelperCommand enum (Int32, cases: enableSleep=1, disableSleep=2, createAssertion=3, releaseAssertion=4, checkStatus=5) and HelperResponse enum (Int32, cases: success=0, failure=1, invalidCommand=2, unauthorized=3).
tasks.acceptance_criteria: HelperCommand and HelperResponse compile. All case rawValues match spec.

tasks.description: Create src/IOKitServices.swift: define IOKitServices struct with cached optional io_service_t properties (powerRootDomain, internalDisplay). Implement cachePowerRootDomain() that uses IOServiceGetMatchingService with IOPMAppleRootDomain, stores result in cached variable. Implement cacheInternalDisplay() similarly with AppleBacklightDisplay.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: cachePowerRootDomain and cacheInternalDisplay return Bool. Cached ports stored in optional variables.

tasks.description: Add to src/IOKitServices.swift: getClamshellState() using IOServiceGetMatchingService on IOPMAppleRootDomain, read AppleClamshellState via IORegistryEntryCreateCFProperty, return Bool?, always defer IOObjectRelease. Return nil if service port is 0 (graceful degradation).
tasks.acceptance_criteria: getClamshellState returns nil for port 0, returns Bool? for valid ports.

tasks.description: Add to src/IOKitServices.swift: setDisplayBrightness(_ brightness: Float) -> Bool. Validates 0.0 <= brightness <= 1.0. Uses cached internalDisplay port. Returns false if port is 0 or brightness is out of range.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Returns true for 0.0-1.0 range, false for values outside range.

tasks.description: Add to src/IOKitServices.swift: releaseAll() that sets cached ports to nil and calls IOObjectRelease on non-nil ports with defer cleanup.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: All cached ports cleared after releaseAll().

tasks.description: Create src/PowerManager.swift: define PowerManager class with cached assertion ID (optional UInt32). Implement disableSleep() using Process to execute pmset -a disablesleep 1 with stdout/stderr to /dev/null. Returns Bool.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: disableSleep uses Process, pipes output to /dev/null, returns Bool.

tasks.description: Add to src/PowerManager.swift: enableSleep() using Process to execute pmset -a disablesleep 0. createAssertion() using IOPMAssertionCreateWithName with kIOPMAssertionTypeNoIdleSleep, stores result in cached assertion ID. releaseAssertion(_ id:) using IOPMAssertionRelease.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: enableSleep, createAssertion, releaseAssertion all compile. createAssertion returns UInt32 ID.

tasks.description: Create src/SessionManager.swift: define SessionManager class with private currentState (SessionState), currentThermalLevel (ThermalLevel), currentPowerSource (PowerSource). Implement startSession() that sets state to .clamshellActive, calls IOKitServices.cachePowerRootDomain(), caches display port, calls PowerManager.disableSleep(), calls PowerManager.createAssertion().
tasks.acceptance_criteria: startSession transitions state to clamshellActive, calls pmset disableSleep, creates assertion.

tasks.description: Add to src/SessionManager.swift: endSession() that sets state to .idle, calls PowerManager.enableSleep(), calls PowerManager.releaseAssertion(cachedID), calls IOKitServices.releaseAll().
tasks.acceptance_criteria: endSession transitions state to .idle, re-enables sleep, releases assertion.

tasks.description: Add to src/SessionManager.swift: handleThermalLevel(_ level: ThermalLevel) that checks if level is .serious or .critical. If so, transitions to .thermalEmergency, calls enableSleep(), releases assertion. If not, updates thermal level without state change.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Thermal .serious/.critical triggers .thermalEmergency state and cleanup. .fair/.nominal preserves state.

tasks.description: Add to src/SessionManager.swift: handlePowerSourceChange(_ source: PowerSource) that checks if currentState == .clamshellActive. If so, calls disableSleep() again (re-assert). Does nothing for non-active states.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Power source change during active session re-asserts pmset disablesleep.

tasks.description: Add to src/SessionManager.swift: handleLidStateChange(_ isOpen: Bool) with debounce tracking (lastLidChange timestamp). If less than 500ms since last change, skip. Otherwise, if isOpen set idle, if not isOpen set clamshellActive (only if currently idle).
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Rapid lid changes within 500ms are debounced. State only changes on valid transitions.

tasks.description: Add to src/SessionManager.swift: handleLidStateChange that works when display is unavailable (displayAvailable: false). Still manages session state via pmset/assertions, just skips backlight control.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Session continues even when display service is unavailable.

tasks.description: Create src/HelperClient.swift: define HelperClient class with XPC connection (NSXPCConnection or platform-appropriate). Implement init with service name from Constants.xpcServiceName. connection property returns optional connection.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: HelperClient can be initialized with service name. Connection property is optional.

tasks.description: Add to src/HelperClient.swift: validateMessage(messageType: Int32) -> HelperResponse. Guards: if not installed, return .unauthorized. If not authorized, return .unauthorized. Switch on messageType: valid codes (1-5) return .success, all others return .invalidCommand.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Message type 999 returns .invalidCommand. Unauthorized client returns .unauthorized.

tasks.description: Add to src/HelperClient.swift: sendCommand(_ command: HelperCommand) async -> HelperResponse. Dispatches message to helper via XPC on background queue (not XPC handler queue per BAN-06). Returns HelperResponse from helper.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: sendCommand dispatches work off XPC handler queue. Uses CFBoolean/NSNumber for XPC values.

tasks.description: Add to src/HelperClient.swift: disconnect() method that invalidates the XPC connection. Set timeout via setTimeInterval(5.0) per OPT-07.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: disconnect() invalidates connection. Timeout is set to 5 seconds.

tasks.description: Create tests/MockSessionManager.swift: implement MockSessionManager class matching SessionManager public API. Track lastPmsetDisabled, lastPmsetEnabled, lastAssertionReleased as Bool flags. startSession() sets clamshellActive+disabled. endSession() sets idle+enabled+released. simulateThermalLevel(.serious/.critical) sets emergency+cleanup flags.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: MockSessionManager compiles with all required methods and properties. Deterministic behavior.

tasks.description: Create tests/MockHelperClient.swift: implement MockHelperClient with Status enum (notInstalled, installed, installedAuthorized), authorized Bool, connection optional. validateMessage(messageType:) returns .unauthorized if not installed or not authorized, .invalidCommand for unknown types, .success for valid types.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: MockHelperClient validates messages per spec. Status and authorization flags work.

tasks.description: Create tests/MockPowerManager.swift: implement MockPowerManager with activeAssertions Set<UInt32>, nextID UInt32 counter. createAssertionMock() returns incrementing unique ID. releaseAssertionMock(_ id:) removes from set and returns Bool.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Assertion IDs are unique. Release of non-existent ID returns false. Double-release returns false.

tasks.description: Create tests/MockXPCConnection.swift: implement MockXPCConnection with sendMessage(_ type: Int32) -> HelperResponse returning .success, and disconnect() as no-op.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: MockXPCConnection compiles and provides required API.

tasks.description: Create tests/MockExtensions.swift: add IOKitServices mock extension with getClamshellStateMock(ioServicePort:), cachePowerRootDomainMock(), cacheInternalDisplayMock(), setDisplayBrightnessMock(_), releaseAllMock(), getCachedPowerRootDomainMock(), getCachedInternalDisplayMock(). Add PowerManager mock extension with disableSleepMock(), enableSleepMock().
tasks.acceptance_criteria: All mock helper functions compile and return expected values.

tasks.description: Create tests/test_performance.swift: implement benchmark tests for clamshell detection latency (<100ms), XPC IPC latency (<10ms), state machine transition latency (<2ms), memory footprint (<50MB RSS via mach_task_basic_info), XPC message handling (<1ms p99), enum memory size (Int8 = 1 byte), stress test (10000 transitions).
tasks.acceptance_criteria: All 7 performance benchmarks compile. Latency tests use DispatchTime for measurement.

tasks.description: Create tests/test_property.swift: implement 15 property-based tests covering thermal kill-switch idempotency, session always disables/enables sleep, thermal always re-enables sleep and releases assertion, power source change only when active, brightness range validation, state space consistency, IOKit port zero always nil, XPC validation determinism, assertion ID uniqueness, double-release failure.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: All 15 property tests compile. Tests verify system invariants across combinations.

tasks.description: Create src/ClosedDisplay/main.swift: minimal executable entry point. Initializes SessionManager, starts a test session, prints status, ends session on completion. Includes cleanup via defer.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Executable builds and runs. Prints session status. Cleanup happens on all exit paths.

tasks.description: Create src/Helper/main.swift: minimal executable entry point for the helper tool. Parses XPC messages from stdin (for testing), validates against HelperCommand enum, executes corresponding operations, returns HelperResponse. Includes SMJobBless integration point.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Helper executable builds. Validates all message types. Rejects unauthorized/invalid commands.
